name: features
description: A feature section: an optional eyebrow pill, an h2 heading and subtitle, then a responsive grid of feature cards — each a tinted icon tile, a title and a description. Columns go 1 → 2 → N (2/3/4) up the breakpoints. Content reveals in a staggered upward motion on mount, and the animation collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The heading renders as an h2 that labels the section landmark via aria-labelledby, so it slots under a page h1 without breaking the heading order
Each feature title is an h3, keeping a clean h2 → h3 outline within the section
The icon tiles are decorative (aria-hidden) and do not affect the contrast of the text beside them
Built on the ibirdui card and badge primitives, so each piece inherits the design system's a11y guarantees
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a features grid section for a landing page
a benefits / "why us" section with icon cards
a responsive feature list built on ibirdui
examples: <Features title="Everything you need to ship" features={[{ title: 'Fast', description: 'No runtime.' }]} />
